Before opening:
- Search existing issues to avoid duplicates.
- Confirm the problem reproduces on the latest Gitty release or current main branch when possible.
- Do not include secrets, private repository names, access tokens, or confidential patch contents.
- Report security vulnerabilities privately through SECURITY.md instead of public issues.
-->
